	Call 85 3e 00 00 // ProcessType[*runtime.spanSPMC]
	Return 
// 0x47b8: ProcessType[struct { runtime.len int; runtime.buf [128]*runtime.mspan }]
	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call 4f 3f 00 00 // ProcessType[[128]*runtime.mspan]
	Return 
// 0x47c3: ProcessType[table<bool,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 49 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<bool,int>]
	Return 
// 0x47ce: ProcessType[table<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 55 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x47d9: ProcessType[table<int,string>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 61 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<int,string>]
	Return 
// 0x47e4: ProcessType[table<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 6d 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,*main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x47ef: ProcessType[table<string,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 79 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,int>]
	Return 
// 0x47fa: ProcessType[table<string,main.bigStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 85 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.bigStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x4805: ProcessType[table<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 91 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.indexMemberStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x4810: ProcessType[table<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call 9d 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<string,main.largeValueStruct>]
	Return 
// 0x481b: ProcessType[table<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 10 00 00 00 
	Call a9 41 00 00 // ProcessType[groupReference<uint8,map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x4826: ProcessType[time.fileSizeError]
	ProcessString 1c 01 00 00 
	Return
